C

calculateFitnessProbability() - Method in class GeneticAlgorithm
Calculates all fitness probabilities of chromosomes
Chromosome - Class in <Unnamed>
 
Chromosome(double, double) - Constructor for class Chromosome
sets the x1 and x2 values
Chromosome(String, double, double) - Constructor for class Chromosome
sets the x1 and x2 values
Chromosome(String, String) - Constructor for class Chromosome
 
chromosomes - Variable in class GeneticAlgorithm
Stored chromosomes in ArrayList
compareTo(Chromosome) - Method in class Chromosome
It compares two Chromosome according the fitness values
computeFitness() - Method in class GeneticAlgorithm
Computing the total fitness
crossover(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class GeneticAlgorithm
 
crossover(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version1GA
This method makes 1 point cross over
crossover(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version2GA
This method makes 2 point cross over
crossover(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class Version3GA
This method makes 1 point cross over
crossOver(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in interface CrossOverBehavior
makes cross over
crossOver(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class OnePointCrossOver
This method takes an chromosomes Arraylist and makes cross over on it and returns new chromosomes Arraylist
crossOver(ArrayList<Chromosome>) - Method in class TwoPointCrossOver
This method takes an chromosomes Arraylist and makes cross over on it and returns new chromosomes Arraylist
CrossOverBehavior - Interface in <Unnamed>
This is an interface for different Cross Over types
